title: Roasted Uruguayan Grape Nuts Casserole
description: A crowd-pleasing Uruguayan dish featuring grape nut cereal and lardons, perfect for a springtime gathering, this recipe is also nut-free-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, cook the lardons over medium heat until crispy.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, salt, and pepper.
Add the shredded cheese, diced ham, and crushed Grape Nuts cereal to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Add the cooked lardons to the bowl and stir until evenly distributed.
Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 35 minutes or until the casserole is set and the top is lightly browned.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
